evals.name: code-review-request
evals.prompt: Review my recent commits for any bugs or security issues
evals.expected_output: Should dispatch to kc-review (or toolkit-security-hardening if user mentioned security). Should NOT pick minimalist-review (business), verify (claims), or artes-systematic-debugging (known bugs only). Should announce skill choice before doing the work.

evals.name: build-landing-page
evals.prompt: Make me a landing page for my new SaaS startup
evals.expected_output: Should dispatch to ui-ux-pro-max (design system) + anthropic-frontend-design (principles) for Plan phase, then kc-frontend-design or fullstack-dev for Build phase. Should announce multi-phase skill chain.

evals.name: debug-crash
evals.prompt: My Electron app crashes with exception code 0x80000003 on launch, help me fix it
evals.expected_output: Should dispatch to artes-systematic-debugging (root cause first). Should NOT immediately propose fixes. Should announce Iron Law: NO FIXES WITHOUT ROOT CAUSE INVESTIGATION FIRST.

evals.name: add-postgres-index
evals.prompt: Add an index to my Postgres users table to speed up email lookups
evals.expected_output: Should dispatch to toolkit-postgres-optimization (specific) over db-optimize (general) over toolkit-database-optimization (broader). Specificity wins.

evals.name: make-pdf-report
evals.prompt: Create a PDF report from this CSV data with charts
evals.expected_output: Should dispatch to charts (for visualization) then anthropic-pdf or pdf (for file generation). Multi-skill chain in correct order.

evals.name: ambiguous-which-skill
evals.prompt: Which skill should I use to optimize my database?
evals.expected_output: Should ask clarifying question (which DB? Postgres/Redis/MySQL?) OR present 2-3 options with tradeoffs. Should NOT just pick one without context.

evals.name: trivial-task
evals.expected_output: Should NOT use any skill. Should state 'I'll do this from scratch because it's a trivial fix' and just do it.

evals.name: multi-phase-feature
evals.prompt: Add user authentication with JWT to my Next.js app
evals.expected_output: Should identify multiple phases: Plan (auth design) + Build (implement) + Test (verify auth works) + Review (security check). Should chain: writing-plans or toolkit-authentication-patterns → fullstack-dev → toolkit-testing-strategies → toolkit-security-hardening.
